name: Code42 Incydr
description: Monitor Code42 Incydr insider risk management platform for device inventory, security alerts, file activity, user access, and audit logs for compliance

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: API client ID from Code42 Incydr console

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: API client secret from Code42 Incydr console

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your service region (e.g., us, eu, ap)

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Verify devices are properly inventoried and monitored for insider risk management

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verify security alerts and monitoring sessions are configured and active for insider threat detection

checks.name: File Events
checks.description: Monitor file activity events for data exfiltration and unauthorized access patterns

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Review user access and ensure proper user management for insider risk monitoring

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Monitor audit logs for administrator actions and system changes
